violations.text: Inspector observed leak below 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026
The floors in the basement and kitchen area is in poor repair (peeling floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2026
The ceiling in the prep sink area is in poor repair (missing tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The walls in the bar areas (upstairs and downstairs) are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Hand washing sink at the bar was observed being used as a dump sink (strainer with ice located in sink). A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed strainer and talked with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Molluscan Shellfish tags are not maintained for 90 days. Molluscan shellfish tags or labels are required to be maintained for 90 calendar days from the date the container is emptied. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Raw animal foods (such raw lamb) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked foods) in the 2 door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated raw lamb. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and plates) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed at dishwasher to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC will use chlorine until dispenser has been serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled bottle. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Bags of produce were observed stored on the floor in the basement area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC removed from floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Inspector observed no hot water at establishment. PIC called building maintenance during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Inspector observed a leak below the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026
The floors in the basement and kitchen area is in poor repair (pealing floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2026
The ceiling in the basement areas are in poor repair (missing tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The establishment does not employ an active Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager, expired. Must re-instate. Proof of re-instatement to be sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. State guidance provided to establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets at 3 door prep unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2024
Caulking at prep sink observed in poor repair and with black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine and quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the dish machine and 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
Faucet handle at 3 bay sink was observed leaking and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024

The kitchen hood fins and wall by 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
